presets.name: Backend API
presets.description: A stack for backend API development. Code intelligence, LLM gateway, caching, and repo packing.

presets.name: Cloudflare Edge
presets.description: A stack for Cloudflare Workers, R2, D1, and KV development. Official plugin plus docs injection.

presets.name: Frontend React
presets.description: A stack for frontend development. Anti-slop UI, up-to-date docs, design guides, and deployment.

presets.description: A messenger bot stack for chatting with Claude over iMessage, Telegram, and Discord.

presets.name: Research & Automation
presets.description: A stack for research and automation. Multi-source search, browser automation, and workflows.

presets.name: Token Saver
presets.description: An all-in-one for cutting tokens and costs. Output compression, context compression, routing, and cost tracking.
